Meta.defaultTitle: Eatmed | Leading Automatic Doors Company in Saudi Arabia
Meta.defaultDescription: Eatmed Automatic Doors: supply, installation and maintenance of garage, industrial, rolling shutter, sliding and glass doors. 24-hour maintenance service in Riyadh.

Home.heroSubtitle: Quality supply, installation and maintenance by a specialised team — competitive pricing and 24-hour maintenance service in Riyadh.
Home.heroModalSubtitle: Trusted by Defense, National Guard, Aramco, SEC and SWCC — a specialist team is ready to scope your installation, maintenance or supply requirement.
Home.heroFeature1Body: Dedicated rapid-response service inside Riyadh, on call every day of the week.
Home.heroFeature2Body: Approved vendor across Saudi Defense, Royal Guard, Aramco and SEC procurement systems.
Home.heroFormSubtitle: Tell us about your project and our sales team will respond within 24 hours.
Home.heroFormConsent: By submitting, you agree to be contacted by our sales team regarding your enquiry.
Home.heroSuccessBody: Our sales team will reach out within 24 hours to schedule a call or site visit.
Home.heroErrorBody: Please try again or contact us on WhatsApp.
Home.servicesSubtitle: Integrated solutions from design to maintenance
Home.servicesSupplyBody: Top international brands with the highest quality specs.
Home.servicesCustomBody: Tailored solutions to fit your project requirements.
Home.servicesConsultationBody: Technical studies and specs matched to your site.
Home.servicesSparePartsBody: Original spare parts for all major brands.
Home.whySubtitle: Six reasons we are the optimal choice
Home.why1Body: We use only the highest-spec materials in every door we deliver.
Home.why2Body: A specialised team selected for skill and reliability.
Home.why3Body: Rapid turnaround in supply, implementation and installation.
Home.why4Body: A dedicated service model for Riyadh maintenance requests.
Home.why5Body: Best value for quality, speed and craftsmanship.
Home.why6Body: Maintenance delivered with professionalism by specialists.
Home.featuredProductsSubtitle: A complete range of automatic-door solutions
Home.ctaBody: Reach out to our sales team for a tailored quote within 24 hours.

About.title: About us
About.subtitle: Eatmed Automatic Doors Company
About.introTitle: The optimal choice in the Kingdom
About.introBody: Eatmed Establishment is the optimal choice in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia for obtaining high-quality automatic doors — including their installation and maintenance — with precision and professionalism at competitive prices, carried out by a team of specialists with extensive experience and high technical skill.
About.introBody2: Relying on Eatmed Establishment ensures a smooth process of implementation, installation and maintenance of automatic doors, with fast completion while maintaining top quality.
About.visionBody: To become the leading company in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia in the field of automatic-door implementation and to fulfil all related services with quality, speed and professionalism.
About.missionBody: To meet our clients' needs by providing comfortable automatic doors — supplied, implemented, installed and maintained efficiently, precisely and at competitive prices.
About.officeAddress: Riyadh — West Naseem District — Abdullah Bin Masoud Street
